zh.Hinton St George, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Paulet於1377年出生在英國戴文哈爾波頓時，他的父親Sir John Paulett II23歲，母親Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere26歲。他於1401年之前與Margaret Burton在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Paulet于1377年出生在英国戴文哈爾波頓时，他的父亲Sir John Paulett II23岁，母亲Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere26岁。他于1401年之前与Margaret Burton在英国英格兰薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1407年在英国英格兰薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paulet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of several places called Paules in the provinces of Zaragoza and Huesca in Aragon, and Albacete.

variants.name: Pavlis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Despina, Nikolaos, Vasilios.
Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Pavlos (see Paul ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Compare Paules and Paulis .
Czech and Slovak (also Pavliš); Croatian (Pavliš): derivative of the personal name Pavel (Slovak commonly Pavol, Croatian commonly Pavao), an equivalent of Paul . Compare Paulis .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Paulet was born in 1377, in Halberton, Devon, England, his father, Sir John Paulett II, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, was 26. He married Margaret Burton before 1401, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1407, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Paulet est né en 1377, à Halberton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Paulett II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Burton avant 1401, à Hinton St George, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1407, à Hinton St George, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Paulet 1377 in Halberton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Paulett II 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere 26. Er hat vor 1401 in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Margaret Burton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1407 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Margaret Burton prima del 1401, nel Hinton St George, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Pauletが1377年にイギリスデボンハルバートンで生まれた時，父Sir John Paulett IIは23歳，母Elizabeth Creedy De La Bereは26歳であった。1401年以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトヒントン スト ジョーッジでMargaret Burtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1407年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトヒントン スト ジョーッジで30歳で死去した。

ko.Hinton, St John, Somersetshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지
ko.Hinton St George, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Paulet(이)가 1377년 영국 데폰 할버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Paulett II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1401년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 Margaret Burton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Paulet nasceu em 1377, em Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Paulett II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Burton antes 1401, em Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1407, em Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Paulet родился в 1377 г. в местности хэлбиртон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Paulett II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Burton перед 1401 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1407 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Burton antes de 1401, en Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1407, en Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
